# IntellectShop

> IntellectShop helps people and teams learn Apple devices, adopt AI tools, and automate business workflows.

Primary language: Russian.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://intellectshop.net/): Overview of services and contact entry point.
- [Services](https://intellectshop.net/services/): Full list of service areas.
- [About](https://intellectshop.net/about/): Company context and expertise.
- [Projects](https://intellectshop.net/projects/): Practical implementation examples.
- [AI Comparison](https://intellectshop.net/ai-comparison/): Model and tool comparison content.

## Service Areas

- [Apple Training](https://intellectshop.net/services/apple/): iPhone, iPad, Mac, business, and creative workflows.
- [AI Services](https://intellectshop.net/services/ai/): AI adoption for business and personal use.
- [Business IT Audit](https://intellectshop.net/services/audit/): Infrastructure and process audit direction.

## Contact

- [Feedback Form](https://intellectshop.net/feedback-form/): Main inbound contact form.

## Discovery

- [Sitemap](https://intellectshop.net/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://intellectshop.net/robots.txt)
